findings.location: s4 — テーブル定義: FILE_CONTROL（ファイル管理テーブル）
findings.description: The table column header in the knowledge file is '型', but the source uses '定義' as the column header for the FILE_CONTROL table definition.
findings.source_evidence: Source table header row: '論理名 | 物理名 | 定義 | 制約 | 補足' — the third column is '定義', not '型'.
